description:
Petit projet saisonnier pour l'été. On ne fera que celui là en hebdomadaire.

- **Synopsis de l'anime** :
> *Que ce soit pour la magie ou l'administration des terres, la petite Lilia est un génie. Et pour cause ! Cette gameuse dans l'âme s'est réincarnée dans un monde où la magie existe. Or elle dispose des souvenirs de sa vie précédente. Alors qu'elle n'a même pas un an, elle commence à s'entraîner. Que ce soit un RPG ou un jeu de gestion, rien ne lui résiste ! Mais lorsqu'elle est invitée au palais royal pour son anniversaire, elle se rend compte qu'elle a peut-être été transportée dans un jeu de romance !*

| Genres   | Comedy, Fantasy, Gender Bender, Romance, Shoujo |
| Type     | Manhwa                                          |
| Year     | 2021                                            |
| Chapters | 0-145                                            |
**Synopsis**:
Geumja Kim is the biggest (and only) fan of Kyle du Vilteon, a side character in the fantasy novel King Maker. Her never-ending search for Kyle content is forever changed when she dies while rereading the book… and somehow awakens in Kyle’s bedroom to a new life within the novel’s pages! She is then shocked to learn that Kyle can also hear her thoughts—luckily, only if she thinks of his name. Still, there’s no time for this fangirl to daydream because Kyle is doomed to die. Can she save the apple of her eye... and in the process, become his?

title: [Dalte] It Was All You (2021) (Digital) (LINE Webtoon)
description:
[mangaupdates](https://www.mangaupdates.com/series/xuejb83), [LINE Webtoon](https://www.webtoons.com/en/sf/it-was-all-you/list?title_no=2675).
| Info     |                                                |
| -------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| Authors  | LEE Jae Ik, LEE Soon Ki                        |
| Artist   | OH Jeong Ho                                    |
| Genres   | Action, Drama, Josei, Mystery, Romance, Sci-fi |
| Type     | Manhwa                                         |
| Year     | 2021                                           |
| Chapters | 0-87                                           |
**Synopsis**:
In a near-future Pyeongyang, clones have become an indispensable part of human life. Tasked to test XYZ Corporation’s latest prototype, biomedical engineer Dr. Yuri Lee is marveled by LPC-6, a physically perfect and intellectually superior clone designed for a single purpose -- to give unconditional love to his master. As she uncovers the depths of her unfaithful husband’s depravity, she finds solace in “Victor” and his extraordinary capacity for empathy. Will her desire for retribution and love set her onto a path of no return?

[@JoeGP](https://nyaa.si/view/1842017#com-2) - We were talking about [this](https://nyaa.si/view/1841478) getting a 2nd season.

| Year     | 2021                                            |
| Chapters | 1-102                                           |

A broken engagement and one too many drinks are the catalysts for a mistake that will change Penelope Zecalion’s life forever, as she finds herself waking up in bed with the emperor! Grouchy, foul-mouthed Penelope is reluctant to let the emperor into her heart after her first engagement went so wrong. Can the emperor change her mind and win her heart?

title: [Orphan] Chuck Shimezou (1080p)
description:
Orphan presents the first English-subtitled version of *Chuck Shimezou*, from the 2019 edition of Anime Tamago (Young Animator's Training Project). This whimsical tale tells the story of minute creatures called Zipper Yokai, whose job is close any open zipper they encounter:

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg5Nkre2Sj5_7Z5gD6VW3JI1YqaQ51FHpCqOAaMEPVFTqErxehKngmI0-IHy1noTL2nmrV0j7xssgZhw3ODZvOhYxCrrCOiFNdJzOzM1UmpYdkj_9u6ZZLReSCRXs14cHUWvJi2fzGn9a5RAzEJx1PyL69zEmNVwbI3QEgq8L3Ha4lBNKplgpYZ3W0bevKx/s1920/%5BOrphan-raw%5D%20Chakku%20Shimezu%20(HDTV%201080p)%20%5Bdelay%5D_001_877.png)

While Mama and Papa Zipper Yokai are seasoned professionals, young Chuck is just starting and seems to have no luck at all, even getting captured by a human boy:

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEjbStv6iaeuuBLYsekFt86JRwhUdZBtZNI1hg321BlbTViBpkmgbEv4qxSOM21Xy_KEapVlMNbNkK5pv_EDustUn8CFvHwOb86A_agXySkFmgHG3XDYOrI098d5PvGOwYw-xzWtFd2Fti8i7ceWMmpFN3Xx9272ztGVUH2S4rFspwamK-Mfl3vpGpfIFZzd/s1920/%5BOrphan-raw%5D%20Chakku%20Shimezu%20(HDTV%201080p)%20%5Bdelay%5D_001_11879.png)

Small adventures ensue, leading to a heart-warming ending for all concerned. 1080p HDTV encode. See [this blog entry](https://collectr.blogspot.com/2024/07/chuck-shimezou.html) for more details.  I really liked the show, but I'm a sentimental *oji-san*. YMMV.

 This release, and all Orphan releases, are available for direct download from IRC bot Orphan|Arutha in channels #nibl or #news on irc.rizon.net.

***

**Mayonaka Punch | Полуночный удар [ТВ-1]** 

***

**Год выхода:** 2024
**Жанр:** комедия, приключения, сверхъестественное
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:25:00
**Количество серий:** 01 из 12
**Дата выпуска:** c 08.07.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия [P.A. Works](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=12209)
**Режиссер:** [Хомма Сю](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=22287)
**Ссылки:** [World-Art](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/animation.php?id=12001), [ANN](https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encyclopedia/anime.php?id=31813), [AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/18454), [MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/57947)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Дубляжная](https://vk.com/dublyajnaya)
**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Масаки — бывшая участница популярной группы ньютуберов Harikiri Sisters. Всё у неё было прекрасно, пока её не уволили прямо в ходе стрима. Однако всё меняется, когда Масаки встречает Лайв — вампиршу со сверхспособностями, которая становится её напарницей. Вместе они собираются пилить крутейший контент и заполучить миллион подписчиков... Правда, у вампирши тут есть свой гастрономический интерес.

**Видео кодек:** x264
**Аудио кодек:** AAC

**Аудио 1:** AAC, 48.0 KHz, 196 kbps, 2 ch (Русский, Dream Cast)
**Аудио 2:** AAC, 48.0 KHz, 196 kbps, 2 ch (Русский, Дубляжная)
**Аудио 3:** AAC, 44.1 KHz, 128 kbps, 2 ch (Японский, P.A. Works)

title: Weekly K Manga Chapter Updates - Week 28 2024 (Digital) (Rillant)
description:
x1378 native rips obtained directly from [K Manga](https://kmanga.kodansha.com/). 
Spreads joined, otherwise untouched.

**Note:** danke seems to have stopped doing K Manga rips already, so I'm returning. He has done all chapters for the past 4 weeks. You can find them [here.](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=danke-Empire)

General info:
* "Why don't you rip X series? Chapter Y of series X already released, where is it?" These rips are purely the series I and JDS personally buy to read for ourselves as well as some series that have the second-most recent chapter available for free. That means that if a K Manga series is not included in these batches, we either don't buy/read it or it doesn't have recent free chapters.
* Batches are uploaded on Tuesday evening except for weeks when a Witch Hat Atelier chapter releases, then the upload is on Wednesday.
* For some series the title is so long that it exceeds the maximum path length, in this case (folder) names will be truncated. *(Example: the folder name for "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability" is simply "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince.")*
* Previous batches can be found [here](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+k+manga+chapter+update).
* To search batches, use google with the following string: "site:nyaa.si weekly k manga {search query}". 
* If you want to add your purchases to these batches to share with others, let me know!
* For any questions or suggestions, leave a comment or message me on Discord.

title: [Goldfire] Lycoris Recoil (BD 1080p x265 FLAC)
description:
![alt text](https://i.ibb.co/LDyDyJX/goldfire-lycoreco.jpg)

#### NOTE : Not my release, just uploading from AB. Watched it for QC, and did not notice any issues

Video Source: VCB-Studio
Audio Source: VCB-Studio (Japanese FLAC)
Subtitle Source: Zafkiel / Typesetting of DameDesuYo & neoHEVC (Edited by Goldfire)

After reading about the disappointment that others have expressed with the DDY script, I decided to make my own personal mix of the Zafkiel script merged with the typesetting of DameDesuYo & neoHEVC using aegisub.

I have opted to keep the honorifics. I have also fixed some grammatical errors and quite a few timing issues and subtitle placement errors that originated from the Zafkiel release.

In addition, I repaired some typesetting scattered throughout the series. One example that was so heavy that regular subtitles were not showing in MPV was the 3:40 mark in episode 7. While my TS is not as pretty as DDY, it now allows the next line spoken by Mika, "What's wrong?", to show correctly. It also allows the information on Mika's cellphone to appear. This removed ~2500 lines of subtitle information that was jammed into a sequence that was only on screen for about 3 seconds.

I did a one pass quality check with MPV and corrected any further timing issues.

That said, there may be some small errors that I have possibly missed, however, I'm quite confident that this will be a more preferred release compared to what is currently available.

title: [LostYears] KONOSUBA - God's blessing on this wonderful world! Legend of Crimson (2019) (BD 1080p x265 AAC FLAC) [Dual-Audio] | Kono Subarashii Sekai ni Shukufuku wo! - Kurenai Densetsu (Japanese, English Dubs)
description:
![](https://iili.io/dfMAUrP.png)

---

A dual-audio remux of [Kawaiika-Raws'](https://nyaa.si/view/1236309) release (encode, 16-bit lossless Japanese audio and renamed chapters) with the Crunchyroll English dub and [Chihiro](https://nyaa.si/view/1843274), [Astral](https://nyaa.si/view/1584488) (edited by WBDP to resemble Doki) and Crunchyroll English subtitles with a forced "Signs & Songs" subtitle track created for each. The fansubs' dialogue and signs were shifted to snap to the keyframes of the encode where possible.

This plot-relevant movie is best watched between seasons [two](https://nyaa.si/view/1366002) and [three](https://nyaa.si/view/1843575), as the following season continues right where it left off, and often references its events in the first episode. If you've missed it previously, no problem, you can just watch it whenever you feel like it too. Enjoy!

Notes:

- Chihiro's signs are intensive, so mpv usage is strongly recommended, while VLC usage strongly discouraged.
- If you use a media server, you can also rename this release to `KONOSUBA-Gods.blessing.on.this.wonderful.world.S00E05.Movie.Legend.of.Crimson.1080p.BluRay.DUAL.FLAC5.1.H.265-LostYears.mkv` to integrate the movie into your show's page (its "Specials" folder) and make it more machine-friendly. The "episode" title in the filename is optional, but will help you remember what the [special](https://thetvdb.com/series/konosuba-gods-blessing-on-this-wonderful-world/episodes/7055302) is. However, **please only rename through your BitTorrent client or Sonarr/Radarr** - so that you can continue seeding the file and helping others download it.
- [Here's an encode comparison of Beatrice-Raws and Kawaiika-Raws.](https://slow.pics/c/g1G1SU7s) Alternatively, I could've also used a Blu-ray Remux (kinda bloat) or Chihiro's encode (kinda mini), but I settled on Kawaiika's.

---

**Chihiro's fansub staff:**
**Translation:** Crunchyroll
**Timing:** wester
**Typesetting:** charon
**Quality Control:** welli, itsP
**Karaoke Effects:** Kristen

Chihiro is recruiting quality controllers, timers and typesetters and is willing to train.
Visit their Discord linked below or contact them via #Chihiro@irc.rizon.net.

Discord: [Chihiro](https://discord.gg/ZRNDEPr), [LostYears](https://discord.gg/F43jMEjzwR)

---

This movie is so incredible that it's one of my most favorite anime movies of all time - a must-watch, especially in dub. Such an entertaining, captivating and hilarious experience. Don't sleep on it.

[![](https://iili.io/dfMzPWB.png)](https://x.com/AVARY/status/1196117244134096896)

title: [千夏字幕组&VCB-Studio] 大室家 / Ohmuro-ke - dear sisters 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [MOVIE Fin]
description:
![Ohmuro-ke---dear-sisters_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/07/08/Ohmuro-ke---dear-sisters_800.webp)  
  
大室家 / Ohmuro-ke - dear sisters BDRip  
  
外挂 5.1 音轨和评论音轨，内封原盘日文字幕。  
MKA contains FLAC 5.1 + commentary track. Embedded official JPN PGS.  
  
这个项目与 **千夏字幕组** 合作，感谢他们精心制作的字幕。  
This project is in collaboration with **Airota**. Thanks to them for elaborating Chinese subtitles.  
  
原盘画质中等，原生分辨率在 882p 左右，线条有轻度的锯齿和较为严重的晕轮问题。考虑到画面锐利度较高，并且动画制作组后期锐化引入了大量晕轮，本次我们没有使用逆向拉伸，而是使用常规抗锯齿配合强力的去晕轮手段来处理，然后进行补偿性锐化。原盘平面质量尚可，我们只进行了保底的抗色带处理和自适应降噪。  
The source quality is moderate, with a native resolution around 882p. The lines exhibit mild aliasing and fairly severe haloing issues. Considering the high sharpness of the image and the significant haloing introduced by the animation production team's post-sharpening, we opted not to use descaling this time. Instead, we employed standard anti-aliasing techniques combined with strong de-haloing methods, followed by compensatory sharpening. The flat area quality of the source is decent, so we only performed basic de-banding and adaptive denoising.  
  

* * *

感谢所有参与制作者 / Thanks to our participating members:  
总监 / Script: 赤座灯里  
压制 / Encode: 古谷向日葵  
整理 / Collate: 大室花子  
发布 / Upload: 大室樱子  
分流 / Seed: VCB-Studio CDN 分流成员  
  
感谢所有资源提供者 / Thanks to all resource providers:  
{PuddingCafe}@VCB-Studio  
  

* * *

Please refer to [https://vcb-s.com/archives/14331](https://vcb-s.com/archives/14331) for more information about that VCB-Studio will no longer guarantee to include relevant CDs and scans.

**Описание:**
Бог ветра Сил по ошибке убивает Такуми. В качестве извинений бог отправляет Такуми в мир Этелдия. Однако это малоприятное место, представляющее собой огромный лес, наполненный опасными монстрами... В лесу Такуми находит близнецов — мальчика и девочку. Он беспокоится о малышах, даёт им имена Аллен и Елена и решает заботиться о них. Вскоре оказывается, что дети не так просты и могут победить монстра голыми руками. Добравшись до города, новоиспечённый родитель решает зарегистрироваться в гильдии, чтобы заработать на жизнь. Он начинает свою жизнь как искатель приключений, одновременно заботясь о детях.

title: [Reza-Raws] Requiem For The Phantom - S01E01 [BDRip 1080p HEVC FLAC] (Dual Audio)
description:
This is NOT a good encode
These BDs are impossible to fix due to the extremely bad flickering, extremely strong banding, lowpassing, poor looking lineart, and generally being starved. I don't think its possible to fix any of these problems on their own without completely wiping the entire video and calling it a day, let alone fixing all of them. I settled where I did in terms of detail loss compared to issues being mitigated based on my own personal preference for watching it. I'll be releasing these encodes as I scenefilter/rewatch them. There are scenes where there is incredibly heavy grain that needs to not be touched by any of the regular nuclear filtering.
One other note is that comparing the regular episodes to the NCs it seems that the main show has the quicktime gamma bug, so that has been corrected. If you look at this release and notice the brightness being off that is why
I am opting to not release with subs at this time because I don't really like the script in any of the current subs and I don't think ill actually end up finishing this if I commit to subs as of now, and I prefer the dub for this show anyways

I will be trying to sub Atri when that starts airing soon. The discord server is open again for anyone who wants to come hang out as well

title: [DarkWispers] The Story of Perrine | Perrine Monogatari 1-10 (R2J DVD 640x480 HEVC 10bit AC-3)
description:
Greetings Folks. We're back again. This time we're working on Perrine Monogatari, based on En Famille by Hector Malot. 
Not to be confused with his other work Sans Famille, which was later adapted as Remi, Nobody's Girl. Or previously as Nobody's Boy: Remi by  Tokyo Movie Shinsha.
We Will be releasing them in 10 episode batches like before.
Also of note : This is an RJ2 Dvd encode, we will be releasing a wide screen release based on the HD Streaming Raws as well.
[A link to the HD version here](https://nyaa.si/view/1843507)

This wasn't too hard encode to be honest. it's a mess of frame-rates, so that's par for the course as far a Nippon animation DVDs go. 1-5  were standard 30FPS, but suffered greatly from decimation and the rest were all VFR. So I decided to not adjust the frame-rate at all. Aside from that, it was just the standard rainbow and shake fixes.

The encodes have actually been done for months now, much of the work has been primarily on the sub titles. The original fansubs by C1 have been thoroughly TLC'd and edited by Dark. His comment below will have more details.

We've also included the Japanese subtitles off the DVDs for those who need them. 

We actually have quite the cast of characters working on this release as well, so credit where credit is due:

Original Subtitles: C1 Anime
DVD Encode: wisperer
Retiming, TLC, Editing: Darkonius
QC: Perevodildo, wowmd
Special Thanks: Collectr for supplying the fansub scripts, ImAWasteOfHair for doing QC on episode 1.

title: [Rampu] Jaku-Chara Tomozaki-kun (Bottom-Tier Character Tomozaki) VOSTFR (S1 & OAV & S2)
description:
# Saison 1
|  Piste :     |  Détails :   |
|:-----------------|:--------------------|
| Vidéo   | [VCB-S](https://nyaa.si/view/1707378), BDRip x265 10bits     |
| Audio   | VO FLAC 2.0      |
| Subs   | [matheousse](https://nyaa.si/view/1840240) & CRfr     |

### Notes :
Jaku-Chara étant une série qui a été publié sur Wakanim à l'époque, matheousse avait utilisé de l'OCR pour faire sa release.
Avec la fusion Waka/CR, j'ai pu récupérer les subs directement de CRfr et bénéficier des corrections d'OCR, orthographes et césures plus intelligentes.
J'ai fusionné les subs CRfr sur les times de matheousse, et changé le style par défaut.

La raw VCB est clairement loin d'être idéale mais c'est tout ce qui est dispo si on veut avoir les retouches bluray. 

------
# Saison 2
|  Piste :     |  Détails :   |

title: 非リア充集団がクラスメイトを女装させて彼女にしてみた (2012) (Digital SD) (Mr. Kimiko)
description:
![Image](https://i.imgur.com/OPSdPRN.jpeg)

日本人の皆様へ、このトレントを見てくれてありがとうございます！
普通、漫画の英語版しかをアップロードしないんですけど、みんなが楽しく読めるために原作、つまり日本語版もこれからアップするつもりです。
是非、お願いしているシリーズがあったら教えてくれて嬉しくなるはず。

*English Translation...*
--'For the Japanese people, thanks for taking a look at this torrent!
Usually I would only upload the English versions of most manga, but so that everyone can enjoy reading these works, I have decided to also upload the original 'Japanese version' from now on too.
Of course, if there are any series that you would like to see in Japanese, I would be happy for you to let me know'


**Note from Mr. Kimiko: Working in conjunction with a friend in Japan to bring about these releases. Many more to come!

**2023 Note**: I lost most of the data in a data transfer. Then I lost contact with my friend. I have the files still so maybe I should finish what he gave me.

Enjoy. **!!Watermark Free!!**

**Donations are welcomed.
---https://ko-fi.com/post/Restoring-Manga-Classics-Y8Y71GUDP

title: [Okay-Subs] The Boy and the Heron (2023) (UHD BD 1108p) | Kimitachi wa Dou Ikiru ka | How Do You Live?
description:
[The Boy and the Heron](https://myanimelist.net/anime/36699/Kimitachi_wa_Dou_Ikiru_ka)

This is an SDR encode. The Boy and the Heron was produced in SDR at 2048x1108. For 75% of the movie, it is possible to take the HDR disk and get the original SDR image from it, which has been done here. The other 25% is a patchwork of cope and compromises. It is at least not annoying to watch, but if you have an HDR display, you should definitely download and watch an HDR version of the movie. (Though probably not anything sourced from the JP UHD BD since that seems to have had bad DV metadata.)

As for the subtitles, they were largely fine as-is, but the translator was working under some annoying CPS constraints that led to some hilarious caveman-esque lines, so I did my best to reverse that. I also added an honorifics track for what it's worth, but don't expect things like Bocchan to be in it.

Finally—and I'm actually really sorry about this—this release only contains 2.0 audio. For audio that suits your needs, please wait for the inevitable version of this release with dub. (I don't think the 7.1 TrueHD track can be reencoded, meaning that I'd have to include a 4GB audio track that is useless to me.)

[Video quality comparisons vs. the 2K USBD](https://slow.pics/c/0d4mzB8D) (this encode is the one marked MTBB)

title: Love Live! Nijigasaki High School Idol Club 2nd Live Brand New Story + Back to the TOKIMEKI [720p h.265]
description:
**All credit for subtitles and original files go to [Team ONIBE](https://onibe.moe) and their amazing team that brought the original TLs to us.**

ONIBE dropped quite the throwback on us. This was Nijigasaki's 2nd Live, in what should have been a celebration with fans. Unfortunately, due to COVID-19, that plan had to be changed. This live would be one of the main introductions into the crowdless lives we would learn to love and watch evolve throughout the numerous lockdown periods, but it would also be one of the main introductions of the concept of overseas online live streams for these major live events, which has carried through today.

This was my first proper foray into Nijigasaki. I wound up skipping Brand New Story at the time, but finally decided to give them a shot when Back to the TOKIMEKI came around. The rest, as they say, is history (though I allowed history repeat itself with Hasu... when will I learn?).

This re-encode has managed to cut out roughly 52GB from the original files while still maintaining visual fidelity, and is 10GB smaller than the 1080p version of the encode.

This has been tested with the latest versions of VLC Media Player and MPV as of 7/7/2024.

Please seed! Hit and runs only hurt others those who come after you.

description:
Get [**DDL, screenshots & MediaInfo here**](https://animetosho.org/search?q=trix+av1+Kimitachi+2160p) | **Kimitachi wa Dou Ikiru ka** [(MyAnimeList)](https://myanimelist.net/anime/36699/)
:---:|:---:|:---:
**Video Information** | 3840x2076 AV1 10-bit SDR
**Audio Language _(Codec)_** | Japanese, English _(Opus 7.1 - 320kbps)_, French _(Opus 5.1 - 192kbps)_, Japanese _(Opus 2.0 - 128kbps)_
**Subtitles** | English (Full), English (Forced), English (SDH), French (Full), French (Forced), Spanish (Latin)
**Source** | BDMV@U2, AMZN
**Contains a [_Cover_](https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/original/atPEzJI8Q0avO7hdejAYahDzItE.jpg) ✅ and _Chapters_ ✅** | [More AV1 releases](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=0_0&q=AV1)
***
**Filtering: crop, tonemap, denoise --> SVT-AV1-PSY v2.1.0-A: preset 4, CRF30 + auto-boost algorithm 2.0**

You can gain up to 700MB by getting rid of some of the audio tracks you may not need.
I consider this release a v0 because I'm unhappy at some aspects of the encode, in part due to the fact all 4K sources are utterly broken (WEB and BD alike) (Examples: [1](https://i.slow.pics/STrrix0E.png) & [2](https://i.slow.pics/8g8cEAKr.png)). I expect to revisit the movie in the future.
***
**Language Options**
You can [download here](https://mega.nz/folder/kcQhWZCA#c4wfvx2RXI9XN8XeBso09g) two scripts that do the following (Windows/macOS-Linux):

- *Keep Japanese*: Throws out all audio tracks other than Japanese
- *Keep English*: Throws out all audio and subtitles tracks other than English

Put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script. The resulting files can be found in the *output* folder.

Note: [MKVToolNix](https://mkvtoolnix.download/downloads.html) must be installed on your system
***
> **Tired of VLC acting up with Opus audio, with subtitles, with color rendition? We recommend the _MPV_ media player for the best playback experience ([guide](https://thewiki.moe/guides/playback/)). Keep your software up-to-date!**
***
> Want to report an issue with the torrent? Know what's planned next? Learn more about AV1? Join the **[AV1 anime discord](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7)**

title: Ore wa Seikan Kokka no Akutoku Ryoushu! [WN ~ v01-13] (I'm the Evil Lord of an Intergalactic Empire!)
description:
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/WJY61c9.png)

Title: Ore wa Seikan Kokka no Akutoku Ryoushu! / I’m the Evil Lord of an Intergalactic Empire!

Author: Mishima Yomu

Illustrator: Takamine Nadare

Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Sci-fi

Translation: [Sloth Translations](https://slothtranslationsblog.com/) (v1ch1-v5ch6), [Nocturne Translations](https://nocturnetls.net/) (v5ch7-v6ch10), [RainOfSnow](https://rainofsnow.com/) (v6ch11-v08), [Cheldra's Translations](https://cheldra.wordpress.com/im-the-evil-lord-of-an-intergalactic-empire/) (v09), [Zetro Translations](https://zetrotranslation.com/novel/im-the-evil-lord-of-an-intergalactic-empire/) (v10-)

---

> In his last life, Liam lived as a moral, responsible person… but died deep in debt and betrayed by his wife.
Reborn into the ruling family of a vast interstellar empire, Liam knows that life is divided between the downtrodden and the ones who do the stomping, so this time he’s going to take what he wants and live for himself.
But somehow, things refuse to work out that way. Despite doing his best to become a tyrant, Liam’s decisions lead to nothing but peace and prosperity for the empire under his rule, and he just gets more and more popular!

---

Added v12-13 and LN illustrations to v08.

Do note that the WN and LN version of this story do not match too well so some illustrations may not fit perfectly, and if you're reading the licensed LN you shouldn't continue on with this version here.

description:
***
### 𝐂𝐥𝐮𝐛 𝐝𝐞 𝐀𝐧𝐢𝐦𝐞 𝐲 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐚 𝐞𝐧 𝐄𝐬𝐩𝐚𝐧̃𝐨𝐥 - 𝐂𝐀𝐌𝐄 𝐲 𝐂𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐄𝐬𝐩
#### Animes de temporada en castellano, latino e inglés y comunidad para reunir a todos los adoradores de la noducha, monitas asiáticas, anime, manga y demás.
#### [𝗟𝗶𝗻𝗸𝘁𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗱𝗲 𝗖𝗔𝗠𝗘 𝘆 𝗖𝗮𝗺𝗲𝗘𝘀𝗽](https://linktr.ee/CAME_CameEsp)
Por favor, no eliminar ni mover de directorio el archivo al descargarlo y así ayudar un poco con el seedeo, gracias.
Intentamos traer gran parte de los animes de temporada menos los de capítulos cortos salvo excepciones.
***
#### --- 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐨́𝐧 ---
#### -- 𝐒𝐮𝐛𝐭𝐢́𝐭𝐮𝐥𝐨𝐬 --

**Год выхода:** 2024

**Производство:** Япония, студия [Ufotable](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=2491)
**Снято по манге:** [Клинок, рассекающий демонов](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=2420)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [BandFilms (SB+FF)](https://t.me/BanbFilms)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Studio Band](https://t.me/studioband)

**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб), Multi-14 | Crunchyroll

**Описание:**
Продолжение истории. Экранизация арки «Тренировка столпов», включающая в себя 128–136 главы оригинальной манги.
Эпоха Тайсё. Ещё с древних времён ходят слухи, что в лесу обитают демоны, которые питаются людьми и выискивают по ночам новых жертв. Однажды Тандзиро Камадо уходит в соседний город, чтобы продать древесный уголь. Вернувшись утром, парень обнаруживает перед собой страшную картину: вся родня зверски убита, а единственная выжившая - младшая сестра Нэдзуко, обращённая в демона, но пока не потерявшая человечность. С этого момента начинается долгое и опасное путешествие Тандзиро и Нэдзуко, в котором мальчик намерен разыскать убийцу и узнать способ исцеления сестры.

**Эпизоды:**
01. Ради победы над Мудзаном Кибуцудзи
02. Водяной столп. Боль Гию Томиоки

04. Обретённая улыбка
05. Готов хоть демонов есть
06. Сильнейший истребитель демонов
07. Каменный столп Гёмэй Химэдзима
08. Столпы в сборе

у Flarrow Films: Ислам Ганджаев, Егор Васильев, Глеб Гаврилов, Иван Породнов, Нана Саркисян, Кристина Шерман, Евгений Толоконников, Марина Волкова, Федор Редькин, Анастасия Филимонова, Ахилл Намазов, Анастасия Марченко, Евгений Рубцов, Михаил Филиппов.
